channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Forget the Kindle Scribe: I've tested the ViWoods AiPaper and it's the better epaper writing tablet at 33% off for Prime Day
item.description: It used to be listed for over a grand when it first showed up on Amazon AU, but now it's just AU$599, making it cheaper than any of Amazon's latest Kindle Scribes.

item.title: Missed EOFY sales? Prime Day has you covered with up to 38% off top-rated office chairs
item.description: Amazon Prime Day ends tonight but there’s still some time to upgrade your home office and score up to AU$397 off some of our favourite office chairs.

item.title: The Vampire Lestat episode 7: What will happen next?
item.description: Time to speculate on what's next for Louis, Lestat, Armand, and Akasha.

item.title: Wait!? Did The Vampire Lestat really just kill off Louis and Lestat?
item.description: Wonder what's next for the Interview with the Vampire series? We've got you.

item.title: NYT Pips hints, answers for July 13, 2026
item.description: The New York Times' latest game, Pips, brings domino fun to your desktop. How to play Pips as well as hints in case you get stuck.

item.title: NYT Connections Sports Edition today: Hints and answers for July 13, 2026
item.description: Connections: Sports Edition is a New York Times word game about finding common sports threads between words. How to solve the day's puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for July 13, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for July 13, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for July 13, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1850 on July 13 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: House of the Dragon cut a fan favorite book character. But is that a bad thing?
item.description: "House of the Dragon" cut "Fire and Blood" fan favorite Nettles, replacing her with Rhaena. So far, the change is working.

item.title: House of the Dragons Ormund Hightower cooks up a villainous plan that isnt in the book
item.description: In "House of the Dragon" Season 3, episode 4, Ormund Hightower reveals his plot to crown Daeron Targaryen. It's a show-only invention.

item.title: Is Sunfyre still alive in House of the Dragon?
item.description: Is Aegon II Targaryen's dragon Sunfyre still alive in "House of the Dragon"?

item.title: House of the Dragon Season 3, episode 4: Ormund Hightowers crash out is destined to become a meme
item.description: In "House of the Dragon" Season 3, episode 4, Ormund Hightower has a crash out for the ages.

item.title: House of the Dragon Season 3, episode 4: Has Alyn solved the rat problem in Kings Landing?
item.description: In "House of the Dragon" Season 3, episode 4, Alyn (Abubakar Salim) has a suggestion that could solve Rhaenyra's (Emma D'Arcy) rat issue.

item.title: House of the Dragon Season 3, episode 4: The seasons dogs are here
item.description: In "House of the Dragon" Season 3, episode 4, we get two very good dogs in the Vale.

item.title: House of the Dragon Season 3, episode 4: Ormund has the ultimate WFH situation
item.description: In "House of the Dragon" Season 3, episode 4, Ormund Hightower (James Norton) has the ultimate bath desk.

item.title: Rhaenyra Targaryen will be a bad queen because she hates fun
item.description: Rhaenyra Targaryen may be queen, but she's also the biggest hater of the Red Keep's most fun tradition: the Small Council balls.

item.title: House of the Dragon Season 3, episode 4: Where are Aemond and Vhagar?
item.description: In "House of the Dragon" Season 3, episode 4, Aemond and Vhagar are nowhere to be found at Harrenhal. So, where are they?

item.title: House of the Dragon Season 3 family tree: How the Targaryens, Velaryons, and Hightowers connect
item.description: After "House of the Dragon" Season 3 introduced Daeron Targaryen, here's your refresher on Westeros' most incestuous family.
